message:
perf(fcp-core): incremental index update in PCS member removal

Replace the O(N) full index rebuild in PcsGroupState::remove_member()
with an incremental update. Previously, removing a member cleared the
entire member_index HashMap and re-inserted all N remaining members
(allocating a new String key for each). Now:

1. Remove just the deleted member's entry from the index
2. Decrement indices for members shifted by the removal (idx..len)

This reduces remove_member() from O(N) string allocations + hashing to
O(N-idx) index lookups + mutations with zero allocations. For groups
with many members, this is significant — especially during rebalancing
where multiple removals happen in sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
